snippet.title: MaraŇülńĪ 4. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
MaraŇülńĪ 4. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti: 
Aziz T√ľrel, Necati ve ńįlhan alevler i√ßindeki arabadan kurtulmayńĪ baŇüarńĪr. Ama Necati o an yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ duyguyu hi√ß unutmayacaktńĪr. Necati‚Äônin babasńĪ ve kardeŇüiyle yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ bu hayati olay nedir?
MaraŇülńĪ, Mahur‚Äôu ka√ßńĪran SavaŇü‚ÄôńĪ k√∂Ňüeye sńĪkńĪŇütńĪrńĪr. SavaŇü, Mahur‚Äôun aklńĪna babasńĪ ile ilgili Ňü√ľphe tohumlarńĪ ekmektedir. BabasńĪnńĪn eski ortańüńĪ √Ėmer Bey‚Äôden bahseder. SavaŇü, MaraŇülńĪ‚Äôdan ka√ßarak arabasńĪ ile uzaklaŇüńĪr. Mahur‚Äôun artńĪk b√ľy√ľk bir Ňü√ľphesi vardńĪr. √Ėmer neden √∂lm√ľŇüt√ľr? √Ėmer kimdir?
Mahur‚Äôun kafasńĪ √ßok karńĪŇüńĪktńĪr, MaraŇülńĪ ile dertleŇüir. Mahur‚Äôun y√ľreńüinde b√ľy√ľk bir acńĪ vardńĪr. Mahur‚Äôu √∂ld√ľrmek isteyen kimdir? √ústelik kendi ailesinden‚Ä¶
MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn yanńĪnda kendisini g√ľvende hissettińüini s√∂yleyen Mahur‚Äôa ailesi karŇüńĪ √ßńĪkar. Mahur‚Äôun, MaraŇülńĪ‚Äôya yaptńĪńüńĪ s√ľrpriz teklife herkes Ňüoke olur. MaraŇülńĪ, kńĪzńĪ ZeliŇü‚Äôin de hayatńĪnńĪ etkileyebilecek bu teklifi kabul edecek mi?
ńįlhan, Ňüirket i√ßin aldńĪklarńĪ y√ľkl√ľ miktardaki krediyi √∂deyememektedir. T√ľrel Ailesi Ňüirketi kaybetme riski ile y√ľzleŇüir. ńįlhan, Ozan‚Äôa ne yapńĪp edip para bulmasńĪ konusunda emirler verir. Ozan‚ÄôńĪn Ňüirkete yatńĪrńĪmcńĪ olmasńĪ i√ßin bulduńüu kiŇüi herkesi √ßok ŇüaŇüńĪrtacaktńĪr. T√ľrel Holding‚Äôin yeni yatńĪrńĪmcńĪsńĪ kim olacaktńĪr?

√Ėzel Kuvvetler‚Äôden ayrńĪlma eski bir asker olan MaraŇülńĪ, a√ßtńĪńüńĪ sahaf d√ľkkanńĪ ile hayatńĪnńĪ ge√ßirmek istemektedir. G√∂z√ľpek, cesur, adaleti kendi bildińüi yollarla sańülamaya √ßalńĪŇüan MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn hayatńĪnńĪn d√∂n√ľm noktasńĪ, kńĪzńĪ ZeliŇü‚Äôin vurulduńüu g√ľnd√ľr. Tek amacńĪ, hasta olanńĪ kńĪzńĪnńĪ hayata d√∂nd√ľrmek olan MaraŇülńĪ, evladńĪna yaŇüatńĪlan b√ľy√ľk acńĪyńĪ unutamamaktadńĪr. Bir g√ľn sahaf d√ľkkanńĪndan i√ßeri d√ľnyalar g√ľzeli Mahur T√ľrel girer ve Mahur o g√ľn istemeden bir olaya karńĪŇüńĪr. MaraŇülńĪ, Mahur‚Äôun hayatńĪnńĪ kurtarńĪr. Ve o g√ľn kaderleri birbirine bańülanńĪr.

Dizide baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu Burak Deniz ‚ÄėMaraŇülńĪ‚Äô, Alina Boz ise ‚ÄėMahur' karakterine hayat veriyor. MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn g√∂rkemli oyuncu kadrosunda ayrńĪca; Kerem Atabeyońülu (Aziz), Rojda Demirer (Firuzan), SaygńĪn Soysal (SavaŇü), Cemil B√ľy√ľkd√∂ńüerli (ńįlhan), Melis ńįŇüiten (DilŇüad), Serhat KńĪlńĪ√ß (Necati), Cihan Yenici (Ozan) yer alńĪyor.

snippet.title: KuruluŇü Osman 44. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
44.B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:
SavcńĪ Bey‚Äôin s√ľrpriz hamlesi!

Osman Bey‚Äôin kararńĪ ile obadan s√ľr√ľlen G√∂ktuńü ve Targun, intikam i√ßin Bizans‚Äôla ittifak yapar ve g√ľ√ßlerini Flatyos‚Äôla birleŇütirir. D√ľndar Bey, Nikola ile g√∂r√ľŇümek √ľzere bir kez daha ńįneg√∂l Kalesi‚Äônin yolunu tutarken, √ßaresiz kalan Lena, Bayhoca‚ÄôyńĪ geri alabilmek i√ßin Flatyos‚Äôtan yardńĪm ister. SavcńĪ Bey‚Äôin ońülunu kurtarmak i√ßin yaptńĪńüńĪ hamle pahalńĪya mal olurken; t√ľm cephelerde baskńĪ altńĪnda kalan Osman Bey, Nikola‚ÄôyńĪ hi√ß beklemedińüi bir yerden vurmak √ľzere herkesi ŇüaŇüńĪrtacak bir strateji kurar. 

G√∂ktuńü ve Targun intikam peŇüinde‚Ä¶

Osman Bey, Bayhoca‚Äôya karŇüńĪlńĪk Kulucahisar Kalesi‚Äôni teslim edecek mi? SavcńĪ Bey, ońülunu kurtarmak i√ßin nasńĪl bir plan yapacak? Nikola, D√ľndar Bey‚Äôe nasńĪl bir vaatte bulunacak? G√∂ktuńü ve Targun‚Äôun hedefi ne? Lena Hatun‚Äôun Flatyos‚Äôtan yardńĪm talebinin sonu√ßlarńĪ ne olacak? Bala Hatun, Osman Bey i√ßin bulduńüu yeni eŇü adayńĪnńĪ nasńĪl bir sńĪnava tabi tutacak?

O, k√∂m√ľr karasńĪ g√∂zleriyle, gaza ve h√ľrriyet ateŇüini tutuŇüturacaktńĪ. 

AdńĪ, Ertuńürul Gazi ońülu Osman‚ÄôdńĪ‚Ä¶ 

KaranlńĪńüńĪn i√ßinde ona yol g√∂steren ‚ÄúaŇük‚ÄĚ oldu‚Ä¶

Kan ve g√∂zyaŇüńĪyla sulanan topraklarda, g√∂k ekini gibi bi√ßilen; yedi g√∂ńü√ľ, yedi yeri, dańülarńĪ, denizleri aŇüacak bir milletin r√ľyasńĪnńĪ ‚ÄúaŇükla‚ÄĚ g√∂rd√ľ.

G√ľc√ľn√ľ kńĪlńĪcńĪndan deńüil, ‚ÄúaŇüktan‚ÄĚ aldńĪ‚Ä¶ ZorbalńĪńüa adaletle; k√∂lelińüe h√ľrriyetle direnen, tarihin g√∂rd√ľńü√ľ en b√ľy√ľk imparatorluńüa adńĪnńĪ ‚ÄúaŇükla‚ÄĚ verdi.

72 milleti kńĪran bozuk d√ľzene karŇüńĪ baŇükaldńĪrńĪ, mazlumlarńĪn sessiz √ßńĪńülńĪńüńĪna umut, KuruluŇü‚Äôun adńĪ oldu‚Ä¶

KuruluŇü Osman‚Ä¶ 400 √ßadńĪrlńĪk bir obadan, ‚Äúilahi aŇükla‚ÄĚ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluńüuna y√ľr√ľy√ľŇü√ľn hikayesi.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚ÄĒ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

snippet.description:

38. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzet

Kul√ľbede yaŇüanan karŇüńĪlaŇümadan sonra bu gizemli kadńĪn Sancar‚ÄôńĪn aklńĪnńĪ karńĪŇütńĪrmńĪŇütńĪr. YardńĪma ihtiyacńĪ olduńüunu d√ľŇü√ľnd√ľńü√ľ kadńĪnla daha sonra marinada da yollarńĪ kesiŇüen
Sancar, iŇüin i√ßine Kahraman‚ÄôńĪn da girmesiyle merakńĪna yenik d√ľŇüerek araŇütńĪrmalara baŇülar. Bu sayede kendi kayńĪplarńĪnńĪn acńĪsńĪndan biraz olsun uzaklaŇütńĪńüńĪnńĪ fark etmez bile. Dudu‚Äônun hamilelik haberi hńĪzla yayńĪlńĪrken aklńĪna soru iŇüaretleri d√ľŇüen sadece Yahya olmaz. Elvan ise g√∂zlerinin √∂n√ľnde bir anda kurulan bu aile tablosu karŇüńĪsńĪnda kendini ve konaktaki yerini sorgulamaya baŇülar.

Gediz‚Äôin yokluńüu herkesi derinden etkilemiŇütir. Onun √∂ld√ľńü√ľn√ľ √∂ńürenen Melek ise i√ßinde bambaŇüka korkular yaŇüamaya baŇülar. YaŇüadńĪklarńĪnńĪn etkisiyle kendi kendine baŇüa √ßńĪkmaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪrken sa√ßlarńĪ da d√∂k√ľlmeye devam eder. Ancak Melek bu durumu sonuna kadar babasńĪndan saklamaya kararlńĪdńĪr.
Sancar, peŇüine takńĪldńĪńüńĪ gizemi √ß√∂zmeye √ßalńĪŇüńĪrken bir yandan da bu bilinmezliklerle dolu bu kadńĪnńĪ kendisine rańümen korumaya uńüraŇüńĪr. Yine fńĪrtńĪnalńĪ ve olaylńĪ bir g√ľn√ľn sonunda kul√ľbede bir araya gelirler ve aralarńĪndaki t√ľm farklara rańümen ortak bir dertleri olduńüunu keŇüfederler. snippet.description:

(22 Ocak 2021)

Halil Sadi, Akg√ľn‚Äôden Selim‚Äôin elindeki tanńĪk Latif CoŇükun‚Äôun yerini bulmasńĪnńĪ ister. KarŇüńĪlńĪńüńĪnda onun yurtdńĪŇüńĪna gitme isteńüini yerine getireceńüine s√∂z verir. Yańümur, Kaan‚Äôdan ayrńĪldńĪńüńĪ i√ßin √ľzg√ľnd√ľr. Kaan ise dańüńĪlmńĪŇü haldedir. Bu ayrńĪlńĪk iki anneyi karŇüńĪ karŇüńĪya getirecektir. Bu arada Metin, Serap‚ÄôńĪn kendisine tepkili olduńüunu fark eder ve nedenini √∂ńürenmeye √ßalńĪŇüńĪr. Selim ise yokluńüunda Fatih‚Äôin kendi ailesiyle √ßok i√ß i√ße olmasńĪnńĪ i√ßine sindirememektedir. √úst√ľne Fatih‚Äôin Canan‚Äôa iŇü teklifini de duyunca deliye d√∂ner ve Fatih‚Äôin ofisine yaptńĪńüńĪ bir ziyaretle teklifi geri √ßekmesi i√ßin ona baskńĪ yapar. Ancak Canan‚ÄôńĪn iŇüe d√∂nme konusunda ne kadar hevesli olduńüunu g√∂r√ľnce yaptńĪńüńĪndan piŇümanlńĪk duyan Selim, Canan i√ßin harekete ge√ßer. Selim‚Äôin sevdikleri i√ßin verdińüi √ßabayńĪ g√∂ren Akg√ľn √ßok etkilenir. Selim‚Äôe ihanet etmekle etmemek arasńĪnda, karar vermek zorunda kalacańüńĪ bir eŇüiktedir artńĪk.

ńįdealist Cumhuriyet SavcńĪsńĪ Selim Kara (Ali Atay), 8 yńĪl √∂nce hapse yolladńĪńüńĪ organize su√ß lideri Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn‚Äôdan (Arif PiŇükin) reddedemeyeceńüi bir teklif alńĪr. Ancak bunun i√ßin tek bir ŇüartńĪ vardńĪr; ońülu Akg√ľn G√∂kalp TaŇükńĪn‚ÄôńĪ (Alperen Duymaz) Selim Kara‚ÄônńĪn bizzat korumasńĪ‚Ä¶ Su√ß d√ľnyasńĪ i√ßinde b√ľy√ľm√ľŇü, tehlikeli ve sorunlu g√∂r√ľn√ľm√ľn√ľn ardńĪnda duygusal bir gen√ß olan Akg√ľn i√ßin bu kabul edilmesi g√ľ√ß bir durumdur. Hayat beklemedińüi bir yerden daha sńĪnar Selim‚Äôi; ńįzmir‚Äôde √ßocuklarńĪ ile yaŇüayan eŇüi Canan (Funda Eryińüit) boŇüanmak istemektedir. Ailesi ile iŇüi arasńĪnda kalan SavcńĪ Kara, baŇü belasńĪ olarak g√∂rd√ľńü√ľ Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľ ailesinin yanńĪna ńįzmir √áeŇüme‚Äôde bulunan Adalet Sitesi‚Äône g√∂t√ľrmek zorunda kalńĪr. Selim‚Äôin beklenmeyen misafiri Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľn geliŇüi site sakinlerinin t√ľm dengelerini alt√ľst edecek; Ege‚Äôde baŇülayan bu r√ľzg√Ęr, herkesin hayatńĪnńĪ deńüiŇütirecek b√ľy√ľk bir fńĪrtńĪnaya d√∂n√ľŇüecektir.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äď Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬†
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚ÄĚ the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚ÄĚ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚ÄĒinstigated by unseen forces‚ÄĒis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚ÄĚ), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚ÄĚ), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚ÄĚ), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚ÄĚ), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚ÄĚ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚ÄĚ), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚ÄĚ), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚ÄĚ).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚ÄĚ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚ÄĚ) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚ÄĚ), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚ÄĚ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚ÄĚ), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚ÄĚ), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚ÄĚ) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚ÄĚ DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚ÄĚ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚ÄĚ), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚ÄĚ), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚ÄĚ), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚ÄĚ), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚ÄĚ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚ÄĚ), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚ÄĚ), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚ÄĚ).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚ÄĚ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚ÄĚ) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚ÄĚ), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚ÄĚ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚ÄĚ), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚ÄĚ), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚ÄĚ) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚ÄĚ DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚ÄĚ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: MaraŇülńĪ 2. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
MaraŇülńĪ 2. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti: 
MaraŇülńĪ, kńĪzńĪnńĪ bu hale getirenlerin T√ľrel ailesinden olduńüuna emindir. MaraŇülńĪ i√ßin ailenin her bireyi Ňü√ľphelidir. Bu nedenle Mahur‚Äôu koruma g√∂revine geri d√∂ner. MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn, T√ľrel ailesini tanńĪmak i√ßin atacańüńĪ ilk adńĪmńĪ ne olacak?
Mahur‚Äôun suikast giriŇüimden haberi yoktur. SavaŇü‚ÄôńĪn hala onun peŇüinde olduńüundan habersiz olan Mahur, MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn d√∂n√ľŇü√ľne karŇüńĪ √ßńĪkar. Mahur‚Äôun bir planńĪ vardńĪr. MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄôyńĪ bńĪktńĪrarak g√∂revi kendi rńĪzasńĪ ile bńĪraktńĪrmaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪr. Mahur bu planńĪnda baŇüarńĪlńĪ olacak mńĪ?
Firuzan, Sedef HanńĪm‚Äôdan kalma fidanlńĪńüńĪ kńĪŇü bah√ßesine √ßevirir. Annesinden kalan bah√ßenin tarumar olduńüunu g√∂ren Mahur ve Firuzan arasńĪnda b√ľy√ľk bir gerginlik yaŇüanńĪr. Hayal kńĪrńĪklńĪńüńĪna uńürayan Mahur‚Äôun yanńĪnda sadece MaraŇülńĪ olur. MaraŇülńĪ ve Mahur arasńĪndaki buzlar erimeye baŇülayacak mńĪ? 
SavaŇü; Aziz Bey‚Äôe,  istedińüi fotońüraflarńĪn 24 saat i√ßinde kendisine verilmemesi halinde Mahur‚Äôun √∂ld√ľr√ľleceńüini s√∂yler. MaraŇülńĪ, SavaŇü ve Aziz‚Äôin b√ľy√ľk buluŇümasńĪnda yaŇüananlar herkesi Ňüoke edecektir.
